segments.text: MAN: Hello?
segments.translation: 男士：你好？

segments.text: WOMAN: Hi. It's Laura Carlton here.
segments.translation: 女士：嗨！我是劳拉·卡尔顿。

segments.text: We've just arrived at the holiday flat, but I can't get the hot water and heating to work.
segments.translation: 我们刚到度假公寓，但我不知道怎么让热水和暖气工作起来。

segments.text: MAN: Oh right! That's easy. Don't worry.
segments.translation: 男士：哦，好的！那很简单。不用担心。

segments.text: In the upstairs cupboard, you'll find the water heater.
segments.translation: 在楼上的柜子里，你会看到热水器。

segments.text: You'll see three main controls on the left at the bottom of the heater.
segments.translation: 你会看到热水器的左下角有三个主要开关。

segments.text: The first one - the round one on the far left - is the most important one for the heating and hot water.
segments.translation: 第一个，最左边圆的那个，是对暖气和热水最重要的一个。

segments.text: It's the main control switch.
segments.translation: 它是主控制开关。

segments.text: Make sure it's in the 'on' position.
segments.translation: 确保它在“开”的位置。

segments.text: The switch itself doesn't light up, but the little square below will be black if the switch is 'off'.
segments.translation: 开关本身不会变亮，但如果开关在“关”的位置，下边的小方块会是黑的。

segments.text: That's probably what's happened - it's got switched off by mistake.
segments.translation: 这可能就是刚刚的问题，它被不小心关掉了。

segments.text: The middle one of these three controls - you'll see it's slightly larger than the first one - controls the radiators.
segments.translation: 三个开关中间的一个，你会看到它比第一个大一点，控制暖气片。

segments.text: If you feel cold while you're there and need the radiators on, this needs to be turned to maximum.
segments.translation: 如果你在那儿觉得冷，需要打开暖气片，这个开关需要被调到最大。

segments.text: The last of the three controls - the one on the right - is usually on about a number four setting which for the water in the taps is usually quite hot enough.
segments.translation: 三个开关中最后一个，右边的那个，通常都开着，在一个数字上，用来调节水管里的水是否够热。

segments.text: Below the heating controls in the middle is a small round plastic button.
segments.translation: 在暖气开关下边，中间有一个小的圆塑料按钮。

segments.text: If there isn't enough water in the pipes, sometimes the heater goes out.
segments.translation: 如果水管没有足够的水，有时候暖气会熄灭。

segments.text: If this happens you'll need to press this button to reset the heater.
segments.translation: 如果是这样，你需要按这个按钮去重启暖气。

segments.text: Hold it in for about five seconds and the heater should come on again.
segments.translation: 按住大概5秒，暖气就会重新启动了。

segments.text: Then there's a little square indicator under the third knob that's a kind of alarm light.
segments.translation: 然后在第三个旋钮下边有一个小的方型，那是一个警报灯。

segments.text: It'll flash if you need to reset the heater.
segments.translation: 如果需要重启暖气，它就会闪。

segments.text: WOMAN: It sounds complicated ...
segments.translation: 女士：听起来挺复杂。

segments.text: MAN: I'm sure you won't have any problems with it.
segments.translation: 男士：我确定你不会有任何问题。

segments.text: There should be some more instructions on the side of the heater.
segments.translation: 在暖气旁边应该有更多说明。

segments.text: Call me back if you can't make it work.
segments.translation: 如果还不能搞定，再给我打电话。

segments.text: WOMAN: Okay.
segments.translation: 女士：好的。

segments.text: WOMAN: While you're on the phone, we haven't managed to find a few things we need, like extra pillows for the beds and some washing powder.
segments.translation: 女士：顺便问一下，我们有几个需要的东西没找到，像多余的枕头和洗衣粉。

segments.text: Is there any here?
segments.translation: 有吗？

segments.text: MAN: Pillows ... yes. If you look in the cupboard, the large white one upstairs - to the left of the bathroom door - there should be four or five on the top shelf.
segments.translation: 男士：枕头……有的。你看看壁橱，楼上大的白色那个，卫生间门的左边，最上层的架子上应该有4、5个。

segments.text: And if you want to do some washing, there's some powder for that ... probably by the back door.
segments.translation: 如果你想洗衣服，有洗衣粉的……可能在后门。

segments.text: There's a kind of shelf there above the sink.
segments.translation: 水池上有个架子。

segments.text: In fact, I'm sure there's some there, in a large blue box.
segments.translation: 实际上，我确定有一些，在一个大的蓝色盒子里。

segments.text: You need about half a cup full for each wash.
segments.translation: 每次洗衣服，你得放半杯的量。

segments.text: And that reminds me, the spare key to the back door is hanging on a hook on the wall by the sitting room window.
segments.translation: 这提醒我了，后门的备用钥匙挂在起居室窗户边儿上的墙上的一个钩子上。

segments.text: Please make sure to put it back when you've used it.
segments.translation: 请一定记得用完放回去。

segments.text: The previous guests lost it in the garden and I had to get another one made!
segments.translation: 之前的客人落在花园里了，我只好重新配了一把。

segments.text: And if you have any trouble with the lamps, you'll find some spare bulbs in a large cardboard box.
segments.translation: 而且如果灯有什么问题，你可以在一个大纸盒子里找到一些备用灯泡。

segments.text: It's on top of the washing machine with all kinds of useful things in it.
segments.translation: 它(盒子)在洗衣机上边，里边还有各种有用的东西。

segments.text: Oh, and another thing I forgot to mention when we last spoke ...
segments.translation: 哦，还有一个事儿我忘提了，上次我们通话的时候……

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes?
segments.translation: 女士：什么?

segments.text: MAN: I've left you a local map, so you'll be able to find your way around easily.
segments.translation: 男士：我给你留了本地地图，这样你就可以轻易找到路了。

segments.text: It shows the whole area.
segments.translation: 它显示整个区域。

segments.text: I put it in the top drawer of the chest under the TV in your bedroom.
segments.translation: 我把它放在你卧室房间的电视下边的抽屉柜最上边的抽屉里。

segments.text: There's a whole file of local information in there too.
segments.translation: 还有一个本地信息的文件夹。

segments.text: WOMAN: Thanks. What about visiting the town?
segments.translation: 女士：谢谢。那镇上有什么可以参观的呢？

segments.text: Can you give us any advice?
segments.translation: 你有什么建议吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yes. You'll need to take the car.
segments.translation: 男士：是的。你得开车。

segments.text: It's too far to walk from the flat really.
segments.translation: 离公寓走路可真不近。

segments.text: You have to pay to leave your car in all the car parks now I'm afraid ...
segments.translation: 但恐怕你现在要在停车场停车得需要付费。

segments.text: I like the one that's by the station best and you can walk to the town centre from there in five minutes.
segments.translation: 我最喜欢车站旁边的那个，你可以从那儿5分钟走到镇中心。

segments.text: That's where all the best restaurants are.
segments.translation: 所有最棒的餐厅都在那里。

segments.text: But if you want a takeaway, the Italian one does really good pasta and pizzas.
segments.translation: 但如果你喜欢外卖，意大利外卖的意面和比萨不错。

segments.text: Call 7-3 double 2, 8-1 for that one, or 7 double 6, double 1, 9 for the Chinese.
segments.translation: 订那个打7-3-两个2-8-1，订中餐打7-两个6-两个1-9。

segments.text: They're both good and they'll both deliver to the flat.
segments.translation: 他们都好吃，并且都外卖到公寓。

segments.text: As for places to visit, yes, do go and see the railway museum.
segments.translation: 说到去参观的地方，是的，一定去看看铁路博物馆。

segments.text: The exhibition is small but really good.
segments.translation: 展览很小但是非常棒。

segments.text: It gets very crowded on Sundays, so I suggest you visit it on a quieter day, later in the week, but not on Thursdays which is market day - you won't find anywhere to park and it's also the only day of the week when they're not open! Anything else?
segments.translation: 周日会有点人多，所以我建议你找一个安静的日子去，一周里晚一点的时候，但别周四，那是赶集的日子，你会找不到地方停车，并且这是一周内唯一的一天博物馆不开门！还有什么吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Not for the moment. Thanks!
segments.translation: 女士：暂时没啦。谢谢！
